title: lithocardium laeve
intro: Lithocardium laeve, also known as Wild Chamomile or Green Chamomile, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a cardiac depressant, making it a natural remedy for hypertension and heart-related issues. The health benefits of Lithocardium laeve include reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and soothe digestive issues. Lithocardium laeve can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
